allow: PowerShell($dir = "build\\windows\\x64\\runner\\Release"; $exe = Join-Path $dir "md_reader.exe"; $i = Get-Item $exe; Write-Output \("EXE: {0}" -f $i.FullName\); Write-Output \("Size: {0:N1} MB" -f \($i.Length/1MB\)\); Write-Output "--- Bundle contents ---"; Get-ChildItem $dir | Select-Object Mode, Length, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($s1 = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://pub.dev/api/packages/flutter_mermaid/score'; "flutter_mermaid: points=$\($s1.grantedPoints\)/$\($s1.maxPoints\) likes=$\($s1.likeCount\) downloads=$\($s1.downloadCount30Days\) tags=$\($s1.tags -join ','\)"; $s2 = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://pub.dev/api/packages/merman/score'; "merman: points=$\($s2.grantedPoints\)/$\($s2.maxPoints\) likes=$\($s2.likeCount\) downloads=$\($s2.downloadCount30Days\) tags=$\($s2.tags -join ','\)")
